tasks.label: Run current topic
args: $target='${file}'; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($target)) { throw 'Open a file inside a topic folder first.' }; $dir=Split-Path -Parent $target; while ($dir) { $candidate=Join-Path $dir 'run.ps1'; if (Test-Path -LiteralPath $candidate) { & $candidate; exit $LASTEXITCODE }; $parent=Split-Path -Parent $dir; if ($parent -eq $dir) { break }; $dir=$parent }; throw 'No run.ps1 found above the active file.'
